metadata.description: Complete stakeholder intelligence analysis covering all 4 essential questions

can_this_be_fixed.question: Can this be fixed? Historical solution precedents
can_this_be_fixed.description: Analysis of past successful repairs and solution methods

results.problem_description: Conveyor belt experiencing frequent slippage during peak load conditions
results.contamination_cause: Belt tension below specification due to normal wear
results.proven_solution: Retension conveyor belt to manufacturer specifications; Implement weekly belt tension monitoring

results.problem_description: While performing monitoring on the screening plant, a corrosion was discovered in the motor.
results.contamination_cause: Inadequate maintenance schedule for brake system; Fatigue and wear of drum box; Communication gap between shifts
results.proven_solution: Develop and implement training program for start-up

results.problem_description: While performing monitoring on the screening plant, a corrosion was discovered in the motor.
results.contamination_cause: Inadequate maintenance schedule for brake system; Fatigue and wear of drum box; Communication gap between shifts
results.proven_solution: Develop and implement training program for start-up

results.problem_description: The excavator could not achieve normal operating parameters due to mounting bracket vibration.
results.contamination_cause: Moisture exposure to wear plate assembly; Lack of inspection in reclaimer yard
results.proven_solution: Update inspection checklist to include gear condition; Increase frequency of ultrasonic testing on excavator; Update inspection checklist to include brake system condition

results.problem_description: The excavator could not achieve normal operating parameters due to mounting bracket vibration.
results.contamination_cause: Moisture exposure to wear plate assembly; Lack of inspection in reclaimer yard
results.proven_solution: Update inspection checklist to include gear condition; Increase frequency of ultrasonic testing on excavator; Update inspection checklist to include brake system condition

results.problem_description: Operators reported unusual noise from the conveyor which investigation revealed was due to wear plate misalignment.
results.proven_solution: Implement bi-annual visual inspection for apron feeder on transfer station; Update maintenance strategy for filter in SAP; Replace mounting bracket with upgraded design to prevent overheating

results.problem_description: Operators reported unusual noise from the conveyor which investigation revealed was due to wear plate misalignment.
results.proven_solution: Implement bi-annual visual inspection for apron feeder on transfer station; Update maintenance strategy for filter in SAP; Replace mounting bracket with upgraded design to prevent overheating

results.problem_description: While conducting a routine inspection, a significant premature wear was identified in the skirt rubber of the secondary crusher.
results.contamination_cause: Dust accumulation in apron feeder assembly; Missed inspections on transmission
results.proven_solution: Source higher quality bearing from alternative supplier; Add chute inspection to routine maintenance tasks

results.problem_description: While conducting a routine inspection, a significant premature wear was identified in the skirt rubber of the secondary crusher.
results.contamination_cause: Dust accumulation in apron feeder assembly; Missed inspections on transmission
results.proven_solution: Source higher quality bearing from alternative supplier; Add chute inspection to routine maintenance tasks
